summary: No GitHub mutations are safe from this dedupe-only pass. The hydrated artifact shows no security-sensitive refs, but the open PRs are useful, overlapping, and not closeable without a settled canonical path. #62775 remains the representative, but its broad unrelated delta and unresolved P1/P2 bot findings make the canonical/repair choice a maintainer decision.
